title: World Monuments Infographic Poster
sourceTitle: Chatgptapp Prompt Ultra Hd Cinematic Infographic Poster

imagePrompts.prompt: Ultra HD cinematic infographic poster collage featuring four famous world monuments in a 2x2 grid layout — Leaning Tower of Pisa (Italy), Mount Rushmore (USA), Christ the Redeemer (Brazil), and Big Ben (United Kingdom).
